chapter_title.ar: بَابٌ فِي إِلْطَافِ الْمُؤْمِنِ وَ إِكْرَامِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 88 – Regarding kindness to the Momin and honouring him

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/137)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/137)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مَا فِي أُمَّتِي عَبْدٌ أَلْطَفَ أَخَاهُ فِي اللَّهِ بِشَيْ‏ءٍ مِنْ لُطْفٍ إِلَّا أَخْدَمَهُ اللَّهُ مِنْ خَدَمِ الْجَنَّةِ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Nasr Bin Is’haq, from Al Haris Bin Al Numan, from Al Haysam Bin Hammad, from Abu Dawood, from Zayd Bin Arqam who said,

‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘There is no servant in my<sup>saww</sup> community who is kind to his brother regarding Allah<sup>azwj</sup> with anything from the kindness, except that Allah<sup>azwj</sup> would have him served by the servants of the Paradise’.
en.sarwar: 4. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Mahbub from Nasr ibn Ishaq from al-Harith ibn al-Nu’man from al-Haytham ibn Hammad from abu Dawud from Zayd ibn Arqam who has said the following: “The Messenger of Allah has said, ‘Whoever of my followers treats his brother (in belief) with gentleness for the sake of Allah, He will provide for him servants of paradise.’”
